main_tariff_id.description: The Genability 'masterTariffId' unique identifier for this tariff. See [Genability documentation](https://developer.genability.com/api-reference/tariff-api/tariff/) for details.

property_inputs.description: Properties applied to this tariff which may affect the calculated cost of electricity.

supplier_name.description: The name of the retail electricity supplier or the community choice aggregator. If there is no retail electricity supplier or community choice aggregator, this field is null.

tariff_code.description: Abbreviation code of the tariff used for this calculation.

tariff_name.description: Full name of the tariff used for this calculation.
tariff_name.example: Residential - Time of Use - Plug-In Electric Vehicle 2

utility_name.description: Name of the utility associated with this tariff
